notes: longer-range single-point laser rangefinder (TF-Luna-style) — same 2-wire I2C interface and XSHUT reassignment as vl53l0x-breakout, but a narrower beam, longer range, and needs 5V rather than 3.3V, at a real current-budget cost.
description: A longer-range laser distance sensor: the same edge-detection role as a ToF breakout, but able to see much further down (or out) — the choice when a robot needs range a short-range ToF module can't reach, at the cost of a heavier 5V current draw.
